'''dhahada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mianserine|mianserine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mianserine|mianserine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhahada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæhædæth|dhæhædæth]] || [[word:dhæhædæj|dhæhædæj]] || [[word:dhæhædæsh|dhæhædæsh]] || [[word:dhæhædæ|dhæhædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhahahadath|dhahahadath]] || [[word:dhahahadaj|dhahahadaj]] || [[word:dhahahadash|dhahahadash]] || [[word:dhahahada|dhahahada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhahadath|dhahadath]] || [[word:dhahadaj|dhahadaj]] || [[word:dhahadash|dhahadash]] || [[word:dhahada|dhahada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhahafdafth|dhahafdafth]] || [[word:dhahafdafj|dhahafdafj]] || [[word:dhahafdafsh|dhahafdafsh]] || [[word:dhahafdaf|dhahafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhahadatha|dhahadatha]] || [[word:dhahadaja|dhahadaja]] || [[word:dhahadasha|dhahadasha]] || [[word:dhahadaka|dhahadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhahadath|dhahadath]] || [[word:dhahadaj|dhahadaj]] || [[word:dhahadash|dhahadash]] || [[word:dhahada|dhahada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhahadathal|dhahadathal]] || [[word:dhahadajal|dhahadajal]] || [[word:dhahadashal|dhahadashal]] || [[word:dhahadakal|dhahadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhahadaathatha|dhahadaathatha]] || [[word:dhahadaajaja|dhahadaajaja]] || [[word:dhahadaashasha|dhahadaashasha]] || [[word:dhahadaaka|dhahadaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhahadathan|dhahadathan]] || [[word:dhahadajan|dhahadajan]] || [[word:dhahadashan|dhahadashan]] || [[word:dhahadakan|dhahadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhahadathaoro|dhahadathaoro]] || [[word:dhahadajaoro|dhahadajaoro]] || [[word:dhahadashaoro|dhahadashaoro]] || [[word:dhahadakaoro|dhahadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
